title: RawBlocks
description: Changes block textures to resemble the Roblox logo.
body:
WARNING - This resource pack was inspired by PhoenixSC. RawBlocks is the most ambitious crossover event in history. For context watch PhoenixSC's Video on the topic.

Isn't it delightful?

 

Also contains a usable version for hardcore gaming. I think the wood textures are quite okay in this one.
